events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From Abbey Road to his All-Starr Band, his beat is unmistakable. What's your favourite Ringo vocal track?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock icon. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your all-time favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the USA, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! The first video ever played? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill radio? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: On this day in 1994, Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which became the fastest-selling debut album in UK history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! An album that defined a generation and Britpop. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock's Opening Day
angles.copy: 57 years ago, three days of peace, love, and music began at Woodstock. A legendary festival that shaped a generation. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year. His music still reigns supreme. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the music world tragically lost Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas and died six days later at age 25.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 today. His powerful lyrics and impact on hip-hop continue to resonate three decades on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi's Enduring Sound
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: On this day in 1969, The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles walked across that famous zebra crossing and released 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from their final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Lead singer of The Pretenders and a true rock icon. What's your favourite song from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, his voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released as a UK single (1975)
events.blurb: On this day in 1975, John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: 49 years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a UK single. Its message of peace and unity resonates more than ever. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple unveiled the very first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod – putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music consumption forever. Did you have an original iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is Global James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the UK premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' premiered. Which Bond theme song is your absolute favourite?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's birth
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. The iconic Beatle's legacy as a musician, songwriter, and peace activist continues to inspire.

angles.name: Lennon's Vision
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision for peace and his timeless music live on. What's your favourite Lennon song, solo or with The Beatles?
